explanation.uz: Statik xususiyatlar meros orqali sinf konstruktorlari zanjiri bo'ylab o'tadi. `B` `A` dan meros oladi, shuning uchun `B.x` `A.x` ni ko'radi → 1.
explanation.en: Static properties are inherited through the chain of class constructors. `B` extends `A`, so `B.x` resolves to `A.x` → 1.

explanation.uz: Strelkali funksiya o'z `this`ini yaratilgan joyidan oladi. `obj.get()` chaqirilganda `this` = obj, shuning uchun qaytgan strelkali funksiya `obj.val` = 42 ni ko'radi.
explanation.en: An arrow function takes `this` from where it is defined. When `obj.get()` is called, `this` = obj, so the returned arrow function sees `obj.val` = 42.

explanation.uz: `b` — null, shuning uchun `b?.c` qisqa tutashuv bilan `undefined` qaytaradi (TypeError bo'lmaydi). `??` chap tomon null/undefined bo'lganda o'ng tomonni beradi → "x".
explanation.en: `b` is null, so `b?.c` short-circuits to `undefined` (no TypeError). `??` returns the right side when the left is null/undefined → "x".

explanation.uz: Avval sinxron kod: A, D. Keyin mikro-vazifalar (Promise.then): C. So'ngra makro-vazifalar (setTimeout): B. Mikro-vazifalar har doim makro-vazifalardan oldin bajariladi → A D C B.
explanation.en: Synchronous code runs first: A, D. Then microtasks (Promise.then): C. Then macrotasks (setTimeout): B. Microtasks always run before macrotasks → A D C B.

explanation.uz: `async` funksiya har doim Promise qaytaradi — hatto oddiy qiymat return qilinsa ham u Promise ichiga o'raladi. Shuning uchun `f() instanceof Promise` → true.
explanation.en: An `async` function always returns a Promise — even a plain returned value is wrapped in one. So `f() instanceof Promise` → true.
The closure keeps the variable `c` alive. The first `inc()` → 1, the second → 2. `1 + 2 = 3`.

explanation.uz: Generator iteratsiya qilinadigan obyekt qaytaradi. Spread (`...`) barcha `yield` qiymatlarini yig'adi: [1, 2]. Uzunligi 2.
explanation.en: A generator returns an iterable. Spread (`...`) collects all yielded values: [1, 2]. Its length is 2.

explanation.uz: Destrukturizatsiyada standart qiymat faqat element `undefined` bo'lganda ishlaydi. `a` = undefined → 1, `b` = 5 (standart ishlamaydi). `1 + 5 = 6`.
explanation.en: In destructuring, a default value applies only when the element is `undefined`. `a` = undefined → 1, `b` = 5 (default not used). `1 + 5 = 6`.
